amended_provisions: The land and improvements described as Phase 2B (Units 100-108 and 110) are withdrawn from the Loe pursuant to the Declarant's reserved development rights, and the allocated interests of the remaining Units are reallocated as set forth in the amended Exhibit B attached.

consent_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
consent_basis.basis: withdrawal of real estate under the declarant's reserved development right, 33 M.R.S. § 1602-110 — reallocates allocated interests but is expressly permitted by the Act

touches_1602_117d.author: Reviewing Attorney
touches_1602_117d.basis: 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117(d) review of the amended provisions
